chapter goal: How does adding the point at infinity turn circles, lines, inversions, and sphere geometry into one picture?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 17 is represented by complex diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.

visual sequence.expected_observation: Complex transformations move circles and lines through one CP1 language.
visual sequence.learner_inspection_target: For Chapter 17, inspect cp1 chart with infinity by identifying which objects instantiate cp1.
visual sequence.library: numpy, matplotlib, local projective/conic/Cayley-Klein helpers, and self-contained HTML
visual sequence.validation_target: Mobius/cross-ratio and stereographic samples are finite
